At $79.99, it includes the full GTA 6 experience, the Vintage Vice City Pack preorder bonus for eligible purchases, one month of GTA+, and preload access for digital buyers.
The Ultimate Edition includes everything in the Standard Edition along with additional digital content and exclusive bonuses.
Players who preorder GTA 6 are expected to receive the Vintage Vice City Pack, a bonus bundle featuring cosmetic content inspired by the franchise’s iconic Vice City setting.
Rockstar Games has only announced Grand Theft Auto VI for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.
GTA 6 preorders are now live through the PlayStation Store, Xbox Store and participating retailers including Amazon, Best Buy, GameStop and Walmart.
However, collectors may want to wait for more information regarding physical editions and any future special releases Rockstar may announce."},{"url":"https://www.videogameschronicle.com/news/rockstar-confirms-grand-theft-auto-6-ultimate-edition-and-pre-order-bonuses-but-still-no-price/","title":"Rockstar confirms Grand Theft Auto 6 Ultimate Edition and pre-order bonuses as well as price | VGC","content":"The Ultimate Edition will include “an exclusive collection of premium vehicles, weapons, apparel, and action threaded across all aspects of Jason and Lucia’s story,” according to the studio.
Take-Two has also confirmed that the Standard Edition of the game will cost $79.99 and the Ultimate Edition will cost $99.99.
Personalized sidearms with detailed engravings for Jason’s Girardi ES9 pistol and Lucia’s Klose K17 pistol.

Bethesda confirms development of Fallout 3 and New Vegas remasters and much more in new blog."},{"url":"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/editions","title":"Grand Theft Auto VI - Rockstar Games","content":"Get the standard edition of Grand Theft Auto VI along with pre-order bonuses."}]}

In this GTA 6 Game Editions Guide, you can find a full breakdown of all the content included in the GTA 6 Pre-Order Bonus and the GTA 6 Ultimate Edition. Unlike Rockstar's previous releases like GTA 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2, Grand Theft Auto VI does not come with multiple special editions, but only one **massive Ultimate Edition** apart from the standard version. * GTA 6 Pre-Order Bonus: Vintage Vice City Pack. Featuring a timeless ’55 Vapid Stanier sedan and garage alongside Ocean Beach, decadent outfits and hairstyles for both Jason and Lucia, and an iconic weapon pattern that echoes the excess of the past. Ahead of pre-orders for *Grand Theft Auto 6* going live on Thursday, Rockstar Games announced the game's Ultimate Edition exclusive items and pre-order bonuses for the highly anticipated game. The reveal of pre-order bonuses and Ultimate Edition comes alongside confirmation of *Grand Theft Auto 6*'s price. | Polygon Grand Theft Auto 6 coverage | Polygon Grand Theft Auto 6 News, analysis, and critical coverage of GTA 6’s neon-soaked return to Vice City and the state of Leonida. *Grand Theft Auto 6*'s Ultimate Edition will include \"an exclusive collection of premium vehicles, weapons, apparel, and action around every corner,\" Rockstar announced. The Ultimate Edition's bonuses aren't just a flood of unlocks at the beginning of the game, Rockstar said, but \"threaded across all aspects of Jason and Lucia’s story, with new items uncovered behind each chapter.\". ## Grand Theft Auto 6 Ultimate Edition content. ## Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-order bonuses.","score":0.6453216,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/groups/1139024369790942/posts/2841437342882961","title":"Grand Theft Auto VI editions and pre-order details","content":"COLLECTOR EDITION Pack $89.99 … available for pre-order.
